title: Type what I want -> AI interprets -> working automation
excerpt:

posts.author: Judith_B (Judith Baele)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want a lot of automations that do not exist. For example ‘When all items in a group are done, wait 30 days and then archive the whole group’. (Not possible, I asked the support people).
So what if I could just type what I want (like in the example), some AI interprets this and translates it into a (existing or new) automation that works?
